education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

work.title: Line Assembler (Temporary)
bullets: Assembled washing machines on a fast-paced production line, ensuring each unit met quality and safety standards.
Floated across multiple stations, quickly adapting to new assembly tasks and maintaining production flow.
Collaborated with team members to meet daily production targets in a high-volume environment.

work.title: Warehouse Associate (Temporary)
bullets: Operated powered industrial equipment to improve throughput and reduce material handling time.
Coordinated with team members to consistently meet production and shipping deadlines.

work.title: Packaging Technician (Temporary)
bullets: Operated and maintained machinery for packaging cheese products.
Conducted quality control checks to ensure accurate labeling and packaging.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to troubleshoot and resolve production issues.

work.title: Sales Associate
bullets: Advised customers on home improvement products, consistently driving upsells through product knowledge.
Maintained organized sales floor and communicated store policies, contributing to a positive customer experience.
